title: Arcle's Medieval Containers
description: This pack gives all the containers a medieval look!
body:
This pack gives (almost) all the interactive blocks a new medieval look! Almost all the blocks were remodeled using actual objects from the medieval ages as references.

This pack requires **OptiFine** or a combination of **Entity Model Features** and **Entity Texture Features** to work properly. You may use **Continuity (FABRIC)** or **MoreMcmeta Emissive Textures (FORGE)** for emissive textures if you're not using OptiFine.

THIS PACK IS COMPATIBLE WITH OTHER TEXTURE PACKS :D

**_Blocks Remade:_**

- Crafting Table
- Smithing Table
- Fletching Table
- Cartography Table
- Enchanting Table
- Chiseling Table _(Stonecutter)_
  
- Furnace
- Smoker
- Blast Furnace
  
- Barrel
- Chest _(Requires **OptiFine** or **Entity Texture/Model Features**)_
- Composter
- Cauldron
  
- Loom
- Grindstone
- Anvil
- Beacon
- Brewing Cauldron _(Brewing Stand)_
- Chiseled Bookshelf
- Lectern
- Dispenser
- Dropper
- Hopper
- Lever
- Buttons

--------------------------------------------------------------------
If you're having issues with the chests in particular, it's likely because of Enhanced Block Entities. Try turning off Enhanced Chests in the config.

Image credits:
Rethinking Voxels shaders used.
